title: CI: performance: machine hyperv windows rootless is getting slower
body:
It used to take 40 minutes. End of June, around the time of (and possibly due to) #22922 , yay, down to 30 minutes. Since then, ever so slowly, it has been creeping back up. It is now at 37 minutes.

See [graph](https://www.edsantiago.com/cirrus-timing-history/podman.html) (scroll down, look at orange line).

comments.body:
Well I think a large part is that we keep adding tests, a test that does a machine init seems to take at least 20s+, and if we start it is is even worse... just look at some [test timings](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6276369817010176/html/machine-hyperv-podman-windows-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html)

We need things like https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/23769 to more effectively make use of machines and not create/start so many of them
cc @baude
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Continues to creep up to 40 minutes
I fixed hyperV testing speed in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/25673
